question: Can I order fries with no salt, please?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Can I order fries with no salt, please?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have fries without salt on the menu. How about our regular fries? They come with a little salt, but that's standard for the option we serve. Would you like to go with that?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Sure, I'll take the regular fries.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it, regular fries. Anything else for you today?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it, regular fries. Enjoy your meal!

final_cashier_response: Got it, regular fries. Enjoy your meal!
